copyright.shareIntro: You may share and redistribute the original content in any medium or format, provided that:
shareItems: a link to the original source is provided;
the content is shared in its original, unmodified form;
no additional restrictions are applied to prevent others from exercising the rights granted by the license.
copyright.prohibited: Without explicit permission, you may not use the original content for commercial purposes, commercial promotion, paid publications, paywalled content, dataset collection, model training, translation, adaptation, remixing, rewriting, excerpt-based republication, or any other form of distributing modified or derivative works.
copyright.quotation: Reasonable quotation for commentary, research, education, or reference is allowed, provided that attribution and the original link are included, and that the quotation does not misrepresent the original context or meaning.
copyright.thirdParty: Content that is not created by the site owner, such as third-party images, quoted materials, trademarks, game assets, or externally sourced media, remains subject to the rights and licenses of its respective owners.
copyright.contactPrefix: For commercial use, translation, adaptation, archival use, dataset use, model training, or any other special use case, please contact the author in advance:
copyright.bindingNotice: This page is an English translation of the original Simplified Chinese text, provided for reading convenience only. In the event of any discrepancy or interpretive conflict between this translation and the original Simplified Chinese version, the wording and meaning of the Simplified Chinese (简体中文) original shall prevail.
